{{Quote|'''Relics'''? Why didn't you say so sooner?|Sprool the Trader|<ref name="The Rebel Thief">{{StoryCite|series=Star Wars Kids (1997)|srtext=''Star Wars Kids'' (1997)|issue1=1|issue2=5|story=The Rebel Thief}}</ref>}}
'''Sprool''', also known as '''Sprool the Trader''', was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] relic trader who lived on [[Dennogra/Legends|Dennogra]]. He was contacted by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and purchased a crate full of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] treasure for 500,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. He also delivered a second crate of treasure to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], as a gift from Solo.
